episodes.title: This Is the "Mahdi" – Abdullah Hashem – They Don’t Want You to See This! –  PART 1 of 3
episodes.description:
This is a video about my investigation and personal opinions on Abdulla Hashem Aba Al-Sadiq, the claimed Mahdi...

This video has been taken down by the Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light TWICE. They don't want you to see this video!


This two-part documentary/video that shows the rise, transformation, and what appears to be the deception of Abdullah Hashem — from filmmaker and cult exposer to self-proclaimed Mahdi and spiritual manipulator.

Via original footage, archived data, and testimony from friend and follower, Joseph McGowan, we trace/follow how Hashem:

✔ Infiltrated the Raelian UFO cult and produced the controversial “Little Claudy” film
✔ Attempted to incite a false-flag cult war involving Prophet Yahweh
✔ Fled the U.S. after a federal lawsuit and reemerged in Cairo
✔ Created HashemFilms and helped launch The Arrivals + TADS pushing conspiracy, prophecy, and fear
✔ Planted the seeds of a belief system where he himself became the message and messiah

⚠️ This video attempts to mirror Hashem’s own editing and visual style — using his own methods to expose his manipulation. 

The purpose of this video is to showcase his origins and what I believe are his flaws. This man is not the man you think he is.

“For such are false apostles, deceitful workers, transforming themselves into the apostles of Christ.”
— 2 Corinthians 11:13
“Many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.”
— Matthew 24:11

“By their fruits ye shall know them.”
— Matthew 7:16

Watch Part 1 to see how the exposer became the deceiver.

Subscribe for Part 2 (Coming Soon).
